hypothesis: an append-only DECISIONS ledger can be compacted without losing accepted rulings
result: CONFIRMED precedent: CEO-approved one-time compaction 494->250 lines (e21d5ad) — journal detail folded, rulings kept byte-safe, git = archive. The template the R183 restructure fold rides on

hypothesis: in-process --sim-go2/-p numbers (FETCH .93/.87, PLACE 8/8 skill + 3/3 e2e) count as acceptance
result: REFUTED (D163/D164, caught by Yusen's bare-cli rule): all measured on the flag-gated in-process path, not bare REPL+NL. CEO redefined 达标 = bare vector-cli REPL + NL + moat oracle + eyes + red-team; every prior number downgraded pending re-acceptance (landed R167/R181)

hypothesis: bare-NL ROS2-stack fetch failure = rclpy startup crash ('cannot schedule new futures')
result: REFUTED by adversarial verify: the ROS2 stack came up HEALTHY (~53s, FAR+TARE started); cited errors are atexit killpg teardown noise, and the quoted traceback was from a different unpreserved run
do_not_retry_unless: a startup-phase traceback is captured from a PRESERVED run

hypothesis: the 10.6h loop stall = pipeline/timeout wedge
result: REFUTED: the round killed its OWN supervisor after a FALSE double-drive (per-NAME lock let two names on one repo look like a competitor); bare-nohup had no resurrection -> ~12h dead. Fix: systemd Restart=always + per-DIR flock + NEVER-KILL-INFRA (now Invariant 8)
do_not_retry_unless: n/a — NEVER-KILL-INFRA is a standing hard rule; arbitration lives in the harness, never the round

hypothesis: the single-source in-process builder closes D163 -> bare-REPL fetch/place ground
result: HALF-REFUTED: sim-launch split-brain CLOSED (launch_explore empty, build faithful) but fetch 0/1 / place 0/2 — native producer emitted a LONE perception_grasp (no navigate/approach) -> actor UNCAUSED. Real gap was the producer plan; resolved by R167 (6/6)
do_not_retry_unless: n/a — resolved; regression = repl_accept.py grounding

hypothesis: colourless category NL ('罐子') can ground via raw detector confidence
result: REFUTED: grounding-dino scores 3 near-identical cylinders within ~0.02 (noise) -> plain max-conf grabs a RANDOM one (eyes: blue bottle held, red can floored). Fix: unique-category resolution via the scene catalog -> proven colour path; fetch 1/1 + place 2/2
do_not_retry_unless: the detector gains colour/shape discrimination for identical geoms

hypothesis: the native producer handles a single-utterance fetch-AND-place compound
result: REFUTED then FIXED: the single-action-centric prompt dropped the trailing place clause (finish after grasp); compound guidance block -> grasp->place 2/2. Harness lesson: combo mode synced on the ECHOED prompt, killing turns mid-grasp — combo1/2 'verdicts=[]' was an artifact
do_not_retry_unless: n/a — fixed; regression = MODE=combo grounded-verdict sync

hypothesis: the acceptance face is runnable this round (qwen brain + qwen3-vl eyes)
result: PLATEAU: DashScope qwen-max AND qwen3-vl-plus both HTTP 400 Arrearage (live-confirmed). Pivoted to offline substrate: Invariant-4 kernel-import purity made executable (PEP 562 lazy world re-export; eager-import drift fixed; 5 boundary tests). NOT a capability re-acceptance
do_not_retry_unless: provider billing restored (external/CEO) or a funded BYO model found (R171 found DeepSeek)

hypothesis: PLACE compound is model-sensitive: DeepSeek native flounders -> legacy VGG (0 verdicts)
result: REFUTED (R174): a pre-R172-fix harness ANSI-sync artifact corrupted the place turn; on the FIXED harness DeepSeek native decomposes grasp->place and grounds all 3 colours (3/4 runs; blue = grasp transient, re-run grounded). D171's finding was never a model/routing fact
do_not_retry_unless: the R172 ANSI-sync harness fix (26eb171/3b28576) is reverted

hypothesis: bare-REPL acceptance flakiness = model-sensitivity / billing
result: REFUTED: HARNESS faults — prompt_toolkit repaint + braille spinner interleave ANSI INTO the sim-start marker so live expect timed out while the stripped log held it. Fix: _clean_log + drain-to-quiet + GT tool-completion marker (never chat claim). DeepSeek grounds green/blue 1/1

hypothesis: red 0/3 (R172) = red-can grasp/IK robustness ceiling
result: REFUTED: a TRANSIENT. Skill-direct grasp_probe 4/4 + bare-REPL 4/4 (incl. D172's wrong term 红色的瓶子) = 8/8; weld fires on center-reach so can width is irrelevant; also R172's utterance named a non-existent red BOTTLE. Hypothesis Loop in DEBUG.md
do_not_retry_unless: grasp_probe.py or repl MODE=fetch red-can regresses

hypothesis: g1 RED perception fails on the face (RAN) because the moat/perception is wrong
result: REFUTED: the moat fired correctly (detection_matches_gt grounded); manipulation tools were registered on an ARMLESS body -> model chained pick ('No arm connected') + hallucinated oracles -> aggregate RAN. Fix: has_arm capability gate; the toolset now derives from the body
do_not_retry_unless: n/a — regression tests/vcli/test_g1_arm_capability_gate.py

hypothesis: the OpenRouter 3rd-brain 404 = key/network fault
result: REFUTED: a STALE DEFAULT — forced-openrouter branch defaulted to claude-sonnet-4-6, auto-prefixed to anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 = no endpoints on this key. Fix: default openai/gpt-4o-mini; fully-qualified ids never re-prefixed; +2 config tests
do_not_retry_unless: n/a — fixed; probe candidate ids before blaming key/network

hypothesis: g1 VLN ('走到红色的东西那里') can ground honestly on the current scene as-is
result: REFUTED at spawn: visible red = unreachable stools; reachable rug out of FOV; detect gives pixels not world coords. LANDED: blue mat (extra_geoms) + pinhole projection — chain lands 0.18m, target TRACKS a moved mat. Honest GROUNDING needs near_object GT oracle (spine gate queued)
do_not_retry_unless: the near_object spine gate is approved (then wire approach + accept on the bare REPL)

hypothesis: gemini-3.5-flash / mistral-medium-3-5 no-tool-call on sim-start = model over-caution
result: REFUTED (R180 positive control): mistral-small-3.2-24b — same family — tool-calls the IDENTICAL turn-1 prompt perfectly; the failures were 402 'Prompt tokens limit exceeded' on drained credit (+ a stale 404 id) — the models never ran. D179's diagnosis was credit-confounded

hypothesis: OpenRouter /key limit_remaining=6.85 = spendable credit (so the D180 billing block was over-called)
result: REFUTED: limit_remaining is WEEKLY RATE-LIMIT headroom, not deposited credit — a live gpt-4o-mini turn still 402'd out-of-credit; D180 stands. DeepSeek-direct found funded + accepted-family -> became the re-acceptance path. Lesson: probe with a real turn
do_not_retry_unless: OpenRouter exposes an explicit balance field; until then always probe with a real paid turn

hypothesis: MODE=both (fetch then place in one session) yields a valid place verdict
result: REFUTED (red-team catch): the place-turn grasp is UNCAUSED (object pre-held from the fetch turn) and eyes_place.png was IDENTICAL to eyes_fetch.png; that place verdict was discarded and place re-run as fresh-session MODE=place -> honest 3/3. Documented MODE=both hazard
do_not_retry_unless: the harness grades place causation-safely (fresh session or baseline-delta grasp)

hypothesis: tests/unit is safe to run as ONE unbounded pytest process
result: REFUTED - 64G host OOM (owner session). Root cause NOT MuJoCo: test_isaac_sim_proxy nav tests patch time.sleep, navigate_to 3s wall-clock probe spins full speed, MagicMock records calls ~GB/s (cgroup kill at 12G; 1 test blows 4G in sec). Capped chunks: peaks 0.2-3.7G.
